name: Wisdom Wealth International School
description: Agent-ready interface for WWIS - an international school in Trichy offering iPlay, iDiscover, iLead programs and Cambridge CIE curriculum.

skills.name: Get Services
skills.description: Returns WWIS programs, descriptions, and grade ranges.

skills.name: Get Pricing
skills.description: Returns pricing guidance and contact details.

skills.name: Check Availability
skills.description: Provides school visit availability and office hours.

skills.name: Submit Inquiry
skills.description: Submits an admissions inquiry for follow-up.
